scripts.build-registry:montage: cd packages/registries/montage && pnpm dlx shadcn@latest build registry.json --output ../../../apps/website/public/r/montage
scripts.build-registry:seed: cd packages/registries/seed && pnpm dlx shadcn@latest build registry.json --output ../../../apps/website/public/r/seed
scripts.build-registry:t-flavored: cd packages/registries/t-flavored && pnpm dlx shadcn@latest build registry.json --output ../../../apps/website/public/r/t-flavored
